findings: Skill enforces max 8 agents for regular mode (line 39) but no explicit commander count cap for metaswarm
Clear distinction between regular stampede (leaf workers) and metaswarm (commanders) at lines 34, 109, 407
Recursion prevention is indirect: max_generation=2, max-autopilot-continues 30; no explicit max_depth enforcement at skill level
Metaswarm is explicit command grammar mode at line 34
GAP: Skill does not validate depth_budget or depth_config in commander manifests before launch
